case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JORGE GEOVANY ROJCHE AVILA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $463.71 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, JORGE GEOVANY ROJCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JORGE GEOVANY ROJCHE AVILA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT.. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, JORGE GEOVANY ROJCHE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILA, JORGE GEOVANY ROJCHE $463.71 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $543.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
